narrative:
Monroe Township B (precinct in Licking County) has 905 registered voters, with 48.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 41.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.5%, a pronounced Republican lean of 30.9 percentage points.
